item.title: US ‘sitting on significant proven reserves’: Analyst says America can withstand Iran energy shock
item.description: U.S. energy security proves resilient, according to one analyst, as Iranian attacks disrupt Qatar LNG production and A domestic oil boom provides insu...

item.title: Oil prices surge after strikes kill Iran’s supreme leader, tankers hit near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: International benchmark Brent Crude spiked on Monday amid growing fears of Middle East supply disruptions as the Iran conflict escalates.

item.title: Jack Dorsey cuts nearly half of Block workforce amid major AI overhaul
item.description: Block announces massive layoffs affecting over 4,000 jobs as the payments company pivots to AI-driven operations under CEO Jack Dorsey's leadership.

item.title: Netflix follows Warren Buffett's playbook: Don't overpay, walk away
item.description: Netflix quickly exits Warner Bros. Discovery bidding war, declining to match Paramount Skydance's offer after just over an hour of consideration.

item.title: The 'off-price' boom: Retail giant announces $2.5B buyback as discount shopping surges
item.description: While department stores struggle, off-price retailers like TJ Maxx, Marshalls and HomeGoods are booming as Americans shop selectively on their own aff...
